title: Amtech S4602 Universal Utility Key, Radiator Key, Tap Key, Unlocks Electric, Gas and Water Meter Boxes
features: DURABLE: This universal utility key is made from chrome plated zinc for durability
MULTI-PURPOSE: It includes a double-ended screwdriver bit (PH2 and flat), a large and small square key shape and triangular and flat offset keys
VERSATILE: It is ideal for use on gas, electric and water meter cabinets, as well as stop cocks, outside taps and radiators
CLEAN RESULTS: Blades deliver smooth and accurate results
VERSATILE USE: Suitable for home, office, or workshop settings
description: Product Description The Amtech Utility Key has multi-purpose functionality and can conveniently access a variety of meter cabinets, valves, taps and radiators. One cabinet key and many uses, so definitely a must-have for your toolbox. Amtech has a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3-year product guarantee. So, keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less. Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No
